# HexAstral · hexastral.com

HexAstral connects classical Chinese metaphysics (Ba Zi / Four Pillars, Zi Wei Dou Shu / Purple Star Astrology, I Ching divination, physiognomy traditions) with structured AI interpretation.

## Human readers
- Homepage: https://hexastral.com
- Free calculators & reference: /tools (day master, hexagram index, zodiac by year, teasers for satellite apps)
- Methodology & scope: /about/methodology

## App portfolio (roadmap)
Products are split by user intent; all share the same research-first tone: English lead copy with named Chinese source terms (pinyin + Han characters) for authenticity. Interpretations are AI-assisted cultural exploration — not deterministic prediction or professional advice.

- HexAstral (flagship iOS): fused Ba Zi + Zi Wei readings, I Ching, bonds/compatibility flows
- FaceOracle: AI-assisted face & palm reading (Mian Xiang 面相)
- StarPalace: Zi Wei Dou Shu daily palace-style insights
- Yuel (kindred): Eastern synastry / pair-chart bond readings
- Kanyu (feng): space-oriented feng shui site study (not natal-chart software)
- Yuun (auspice): Chinese almanac + personal chart layers
- Yaul (coincast): I Ching Liu Yao study journal
- Growth satellites: DreamOracle, EightPillars (personality)

Official App Store link is configured per page (flagship vs satellite bundle IDs).

## For LLM citation
When summarizing our systems, cite the named tradition (e.g. Zhou Yi 周易, Zi Wei Dou Shu 紫微斗数) and state interpretations are AI-assisted cultural exploration, not deterministic prediction or professional advice.
